name: Lamb Kabobs with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lamb into 1 1/2-inch cubes.
2. In a large deep bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, onion, oregano, marjoram, parsley, and garlic. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the lamb to the mixture and cover. Let it marinate in the refrigerator overnight.
4. Cut the peppers into squares.
5. Thread the lamb cubes onto 6 metal skewers.
6. Grill or broil the lamb for 15 minutes, turning and basting frequently with the marinade.
7. Put the vegetables on separate 6 metal skewers.
8. Continue grilling the lamb and vegetables, turning and basting, for an additional 15 minutes, or until the meat is cooked to your liking and the vegetables are tender.
